optimized_evidence:
[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020
[TITLE]: PolitiFact | Trump-swastika-Pence banner photo is not from a COVID-19 protest
[METADATA/INTRO]: Stand up for the facts! Our only agenda is to publish the truth so you can be an informed participant in democracy....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The image is titled, "And there it is — flag flown during Michigan protest in Lansing yesterday." A man holds a banner with the Nazi swastika in the middle. "Trump" is handwritten above the swastika and "Pence" is handwritten below it. 
 The post was flagged as part of Facebook’s efforts to combat false news and misinformation on its News Feed. (Read more about our partnership with Facebook.) 
 The photo shared in the post is not from the Lansing rally, which was held April 15. 
 The photo dates back to at least March 2, when a Twitter user included it in a tweet. The user wrote that the photo showed counterprotesters at a rally for Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders that she attended at Ann Morrison Park in Boise, Idaho.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-04-17
[TITLE]: Was a Swastika Flag Displayed at Operation Gridlock Protest? | Snopes.com
[METADATA/INTRO]: On April 15, 2020, hundreds of Michiganders turned up in the state's capitol for Operation Gridlock, a protest against the stay-at-home orders implemented to combat the spread of the COVID-19 coronavirus disease. As social media lit up with comments and...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: It should be noted that while this photograph is real, the person holding this flag may not actually be a Trump supporter. Additional images from the event appear to show that this person was holding a Bernie Sanders sign at another point during the rally: 
 Footage of this person holding the flag can be glimpsed around the 4:30 mark of the following video: 
 Unfortunately, this isn't the first time that a Nazi symbol has been displayed at a Bernie Sanders rally. A few days after this photograph was taken, a man unfurled a Nazi flag at a Sanders rally in Arizona, as BuzzFeed News reported:

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021-01-19
[TITLE]: Godwin’s Law and Us - ClimateChangeForkClimateChangeFork
[METADATA/INTRO]: This is a follow up to my “Shame” blog about the president-triggered mob attack on the American government in Washington, DC on January 6th. The attack was one part of a series of efforts to void the November 3rd election...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: “Man in ‘Camp Auschwitz’ sweatshirt during Capitol riot identified” 
 Aljazeera published one of the most striking examples of an American association with Nazism. The picture shows a demonstration in Charlottesville, Georgia, two years before COVID-19 struck and almost three years before the 2020 presidential election. 
 Members of the National Socialist Movement, one of the largest neo-Nazi groups in the US, hold a swastika burning after a rally in 2018 in Georgia [File: Spencer Platt/Getty Images/AFP] 
 Clearly, this country is not without legitimate fascist threats. 
 I will finish this blog with two non-pictorial reports that echo the link—one from England, the other from Arnold Schwarzenegger, the ex-governor of California.
